title: Treasure of Alognov
description: In the distant past, the great castle lost its grandeur and became an abandoned place. Legends said that the treasures of the Alogons were hidden inside the castle. One day, a group of archaeologists decided to explore the castle and uncover its secrets. They set off on a dangerous journey through the intricate corridors and dark caves of the castle. After several hours of research, they came across a secret room that contained an ancient treasure chest. However, the chest was closed and placed in a cage to protect it from outsiders. The archaeologists had to use all their knowledge and dexterity to solve the puzzles that guarded the chest
instructions: Control of the game with the mouse Moving blocks using the keyboard
